product_overview: Adamantio is a Peruvian-focused e-commerce storefront that enables guests and registered users to browse a categorized product catalog, add items to a persistent cart, and checkout using Mercado Pago (card) or Yape. The frontend provides fast search, category browsing, detailed product pages, and a checkout flow with shipping selection and payment status pages.
core_goals: Provide a smooth guest-first shopping experience with quick catalog discovery and accent-insensitive search.
Support local Peruvian payment methods (Mercado Pago cards and Yape) and clear payment status handling.
Keep cart state client-persistent (localStorage) and minimize friction to conversion (slider, quick add, checkout).
Expose clear order confirmation and payment status pages with idempotent webhook reconciliation on the backend.

features.name: Catalog / Home Page
features.description: Landing page with featured category cards and a recently added products horizontal slider to quickly surface new items.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View featured category cards with CTA links -> Browse recently added products in horizontal slider -> Click on a product card to navigate to /producto/:productSlug -> See Product Detail page load
Navigate to / -> Click on a category card to navigate to /categoria/:categorySlug -> See category product listing load -> If category has no products see a 'No products found' empty state message

features.name: Product Search (header drawer)
features.description: Real-time, accent-insensitive product search available via a header drawer that shows results with image, name, category and price.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click search icon in header to open search drawer -> Type at least 2 characters in search input -> View search results with image, name, category, and price -> Click on a result to navigate to /producto/:productSlug -> See Product Detail page load

Navigate to / -> Click search icon in header to open search drawer -> Type 1 character in search input -> See inline hint or no-results state 'Escribe al menos 2 caracteres' -> Click X in drawer to close search drawer

features.name: Category Browsing
features.description: Browse products filtered by category with sorting options, grid/list toggle and pagination for discovery.
user_flows: Navigate to /categoria/:categorySlug -> View product list for the category -> Select sort option (e.g. latest) -> Toggle between grid and list view -> Click pagination page numbers -> Click on a product card to navigate to /producto/:productSlug -> See Product Detail page load
Navigate to /categoria/:categorySlug -> Click pagination page numbers for a page beyond available range -> See no-products-on-page message or be redirected to the last available page

features.name: Product Detail
features.description: Detailed product page with image gallery, collapsible informational sections, stock indicator, optional engraving field and Add to Cart action.
user_flows: Navigate to /producto/:productSlug -> View product image gallery (swipe on mobile or click thumbnails) -> Click image to open lightbox full-screen view -> Toggle collapsible sections (Detalles, Talla, Envío, Grabado) -> Click 'Agregar al carrito' button to add product to cart -> See 'Agregado al carrito' visual feedback -> Navigate to /cart

Navigate to /producto/:productSlug for a product with stock = 0 -> See 'Sin stock' state displayed -> Click 'Agregar al carrito' button -> See Add-to-cart disabled and an error/tooltip indicating product is out of stock

features.name: Shopping Cart
features.description: Cart page shows persisted items with quantity controls, remove actions, subtotal calculation and a call-to-action to continue to checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to /cart -> View all cart items with image, name, price, quantity, and line total -> Increment quantity using + button -> Type quantity directly in input field -> View updated subtotal and total price -> Click 'Continuar con la compra' button to go to /checkout -> Navigate to /checkout

Navigate to /cart -> Type an invalid quantity (e.g. 0 or greater than 10) in the quantity input -> See inline validation that restricts quantity to 1–10 and an error message -> Click remove button to delete an item from cart -> See item removed and totals update

features.name: Checkout
features.description: Multi-step checkout form collecting contact, document and address (Peru ubigeo cascades), shipping method, and payment via Mercado Pago (card) or Yape OTP.
user_flows: Navigate to /checkout -> Fill in email, first name and last name fields -> Select document type (DNI or Carnet de Extranjería) -> Fill document number and phone -> Fill street address -> Select department from dropdown -> Select province -> Select district -> Select shipping method (Shalom) -> Select payment method tab Card -> Complete Mercado Pago Payment Brick fields -> Click 'Confirmar pedido' button to submit -> Be redirected to /checkout/success

Navigate to /checkout -> Leave email blank and/or enter invalid document number -> Click 'Confirmar pedido' button -> See inline validation errors for required fields (e.g. 'Email is required', 'Documento inválido') -> Correct fields and re-submit

Navigate to /checkout -> Select payment method Yape -> Enter phone number that is not 9 digits or doesn't start with 9 -> Attempt to request OTP -> See validation error preventing OTP request -> Correct phone and complete OTP inputs -> Click 'Confirmar pedido' -> Redirect to /checkout/pending or /checkout/success depending on payment processing

features.name: Order Confirmation (Checkout Success / Failure / Pending)
features.description: Pages that surface order summary and payment status after checkout: success, failure, or pending, including order and payment metadata.
user_flows: After payment redirect to /checkout/success?external_reference=order_X&payment_id=Y -> View order ID, creation date, customer name and email -> View shipping address -> View ordered products with images, quantities and prices -> View subtotal, shipping cost breakdown and payment status history

Navigate to /checkout/success?external_reference=order_X without matching guest email or token -> See an error or verification prompt ('Order not found or email mismatch') with instructions to contact support or provide guest email

features.name: Legal Pages
features.description: Static informational pages accessible from footer links: terms of service, refund policy, privacy policy and complaints book.
user_flows: Navigate to /terminos-de-servicio -> Read static content of terms of service -> Click footer link to /politica-de-privacidad -> Read static content of privacy policy
Navigate to /terminos-de-servicio while network fails to load static content -> See a generic error or offline message with option to retry or contact support

tech_stack.other: Zustand, Vite, Mercado Pago SDK, keepalive-for-react

routes.description: Home page with featured categories and recently added products slider
Product detail page by numeric ID
Product detail page by slug (SEO-friendly URL)
Category page with product listing, sorting, and pagination
Shopping cart with quantity controls and checkout link
Checkout form with address, shipping, and payment
Order confirmation with payment status and order summary

features.name: Catalog / Home Page
features.description: Displays featured categories and a recently added products slider on the home page
user_interactions: View featured category cards with CTA links
Browse recently added products in horizontal slider
Click Previous/Next buttons to scroll slider
Click on a product card to navigate to product detail
Click on a category card to navigate to category page

features.name: Product Search
features.description: Real-time product search via drawer in header with accent-insensitive results
user_interactions: Click search icon in header to open search drawer
Type at least 2 characters in search input
View search results with image, name, category, and price
Click on a result to navigate to product detail page
Click X or press Escape to close drawer

features.name: Category Browsing
features.description: Browse products filtered by category with sorting and pagination
user_interactions: Select sort option (latest, price asc/desc, name asc/desc)
Toggle between grid and list view
Click pagination page numbers
Click on a product card to view detail

features.name: Product Detail
features.description: View product images, description, size info, and add to cart
user_interactions: View product image gallery (swipe or click thumbnails)
Click Previous/Next buttons for gallery navigation
Click image to open lightbox full-screen view
Click "Agregar al carrito" button to add product to cart
Toggle collapsible sections (Detalles, Talla, Envio, Grabado)
View breadcrumb navigation and click category link

features.name: Shopping Cart
features.description: View and manage cart items with quantity controls before checkout
user_interactions: View all cart items with image, name, price, quantity, and line total
Increment or decrement quantity using +/- buttons
Type quantity directly in input field
Click remove button to delete an item from cart
View subtotal and total price
View free shipping banner when total is below S/ 299
Click "Continuar con la compra" button to go to checkout

features.name: Checkout
features.description: Complete purchase with personal info, shipping address, and payment
user_interactions: Fill in email, first name, last name fields
Select document type (DNI or Carnet de Extranjeria)
Fill in document number and phone
Fill in street address
Select department from dropdown (24 Peruvian departments)
Select province (cascading from department)
Select district (cascading from province)
Select shipping method (Shalom or Olva Courier)
Select payment method tab (Card or Yape)

user_interactions.For card: complete Mercado Pago Payment Brick fields

user_interactions.For Yape: enter phone number and OTP code

user_interactions: Click "Confirmar pedido" button to submit

features.name: Order Confirmation
features.description: Display order summary and payment status after successful checkout
user_interactions: View order ID, creation date, customer name, and email
View shipping address
View ordered products with images, quantities, and prices
View subtotal, shipping cost breakdown
View payment status history

features.name: Legal Pages
features.description: Static informational pages for terms, refund policy, privacy, and complaints
user_interactions: Navigate to legal page from footer links
Read static content

known_limitations.issue: Payment requires real Mercado Pago credentials; Yape OTP cannot be automated
known_limitations.impact: Full payment flow cannot be tested end-to-end without real payment credentials

known_limitations.issue: VITE_SKIP_PAYMENT env var can bypass payment for dev testing
known_limitations.impact: Order creation can be tested without payment in dev mode

known_limitations.issue: Cart state is persisted only in localStorage (no backend sync)
known_limitations.impact: Cart is lost if localStorage is cleared; no cross-device sync
